allow: Bash(cd /c/Users/razva/Desktop/skillSwap/backend && python -c "from app.main import app; print\('All imports OK'\)")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate 2>/dev/null || source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python -c "
from supabase import create_client
c = create_client\('https://example.com', 'key'\)
print\(type\(c.auth\)\)
" 2>&1; pip list 2>&1 | grep -i -E "gotrue|supabase|auth")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate 2>/dev/null || source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python -c "
import supabase_auth
print\(dir\(supabase_auth\)\)
" 2>&1 | tr ',' '\\n' | grep -i error)
Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate 2>/dev/null || source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python -c "from supabase_auth.errors import AuthApiError; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate 2>/dev/null || source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python -c "from app.main import app; print\('All imports OK'\); routes = [r.path for r in app.routes]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(routes\)\)\)")
